case_title: INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL, LLC VS. NICOLE FARB ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-22-2020 CONTINUED TO AUG-19-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-17-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FARB, NICOLE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-22-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-21-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-30-2020
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100094469) AS TO DEFENDANT FARB, NICOLE
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, ***DUPLICATE*** (TRANSACTION ID # 100112870) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FARB, NICOLE
DECLARATION OF WILLIAM WHITEMAN (TRANSACTION ID # 100113175) FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE AUG-19-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, ***DUPLICATE***(TRANSACTION ID # 100113175) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FARB, NICOLE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100094273), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL, LLC SERVED DEC-13-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FARB, NICOLE
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FARB, NICOLE
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100118024): GHATAN, SHAREN H SUBSTITUTED FOR WHITEMAN, WILLIAM DOUGLAS AS ATTORNEY FOR INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL, LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FARB, NICOLE
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $782.85 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100113175) AS TO DEFENDANT FARB, NICOLE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARB, NICOLE $12,120.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,550.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $4,844.68 INTEREST, $782.85 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,297.53, SEE SCANNED DOC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100112870) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
DECLARATION OF PUNEH SOHRABPOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 100113175) FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL EXECUTIVE RENTAL, LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FARB, NICOLE
